tui.error.bad_key: Unrecognized key. Ask your deployer for a valid invite key.
tui.error.rate_limited: You're sending messages too fast. Please slow down.
tui.error.server_error: Something went wrong handling that turn. Please try again.
tui.error.join_timeout: Timed out waiting for your join message.
tui.error.too_many_connections: The server is at its connection limit. Please try again shortly.
tui.admin.error.forbidden: Admin actions require a keeper key.
tui.admin.error.unknown_provider: Unknown LLM provider. Pick one from the provider list.
tui.admin.error.not_found: The requested room or key was not found.
tui.admin.error.op_failed: Room backup, import, or delete failed. Check the path and server file permissions.
tui.admin.error.set_failed: Could not switch LLM provider (its SDK or API key may be missing). Kept the previous configuration.
tui.serve.listening: Serving the networked TUI at ws://{host}:{port}/ (keys: {path})
tui.serve.bootstrap.banner: ★ First run: no keys yet, so minted a keeper key for room '{room}'.
tui.serve.bootstrap.hint: Connect with it to administer the server from the client (mint more keys, import modules). Saved to {path}.
tui.serve.none: No transport enabled (--no-iroh with no --ws). Nothing to serve.
tui.serve.iroh.banner: ★ Iroh p2p transport ready. Share this ticket + an invite key; friends connect with no domain/TLS/port-forward.
tui.serve.iroh.hint: Saved to {path}. Share the ticket + an invite key; friends dial in with no domain/TLS/port.
tui.serve.iroh.missing: The 'iroh' package is not installed — install it: pip install iroh (or uv sync).
